{{Quote|Once Throm got the Alliance's attention, the Imps went crazy. They finally got him at the Battle of the Cliffs. Groznik was devastated. No opportunity to repay the debt.|[[Elscol Loro]]|<ref name="Rebel" />}}
The '''Battle of the Cliffs''' was a battle fought on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Cilpar]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Background==
After liberating an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] base on [[Endor/Legends|Endor]], [[Throm Loro]] led members of the [[Cilpari Resistance]] against [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Boren Tascl]]'s forces. When Loro's actions caught the attention of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]], Moff Tascl responded by engaging the resistance in open warfare.

==The battle==
Throm Loro's last stand was in a mountainous region of the planet, where he was accompanied by [[Groznik]], a [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Slavery/Legends|slave]] he had freed on Endor. During the battle, two [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class shuttles]] launched a strafing run on the resistance soldiers on a rocky plateau. Throm was caught in the laser fire and killed. Groznik, having sworn a [[Life debt/Legends|life debt]] to Throm, retaliated, hurling a boulder at one of the shuttles and destroying it.

{{Battle-stub}}
